quote: If the world is upside down, then we don’t adjust to it. We flip it.
author: Rev. Randy Lewis
socialPost:
When the world feels flipped, let us not simply adapt; instead, let's rise with courage and reshape it. Together, we hold the power to inspire hope and justice in every step we take.

https://blog.revrandylewis.com/upside-down/

#Courage #Hope #Justice #Power
